race.comment: PUNIC WAR (6) has a tricky gate but won't get a better chance to break through in a moderate maiden. Fourth at Sandown two back then just missed last time when beaten a head after sitting deep throughout. Close to a win and with any luck in the run will go close. DON'T SAY NO MIKKI (3) was fourth here fresh beaten less than a length then finished third at the latest at Ararat. Ready to win and will go back from the wide draw and get home hard. SHAY'S WAY (12) ran a better race second-up and has placed third-up. One of the chances.  DARATING (2) went back last time and never got into the race but the start prior was fourth beaten only a head. Rates well here on that figure.
